content.text:
{"success":true,"process_rule_id":"J09D","process_rule":"1. Make a copy of decision_table with TOURS starting with J09D named J09D_temp
2. Update the table with an additional empty column ENTSCHEIDUNG
3. Apply the following rules to the joined table:
    1. Count the number of EQUNR for every HAUS and set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA" if there are less than 3 EQUNR. ELSE set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "EVU"
    2. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 of 0 to "EVU"
    3. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 500 - 599 to "EVU"
    4. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 900 - 999 to "EVU"
    5. SET all houses with address area Wiblingwerde or Breckerfeld to "EVU"
4. JOIN this table with the EABLG table using INSTALLATION.
5. JOIN this table with the NET_MASTER table and the SALES_MASTER table using EQUNR.
6. Compare sales data and net data for these IDs:
    If sales data is there, take sales data and empty net data.
    Otherwise stay with net data and empty sales data.
7. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "MANDATORY_READING", for every EQUNR in EABL where both ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the Record created on 2024 and ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the Record created on 2023.
8. Export all MANDATORY_READING entries from the final table as CSV file named J09D_MANDATORY_READING including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
9. Send them to the the internal team to mandatory.reading@provider.com
10. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "DIRECT_MAIL", for every EQUNR in EABL where ISTABLART_TXT = "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP" in 2024 and ISTABLART_TXT = "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP" in 2023.
11. Export all DIRECT_MAIL entries from the final table as CSV file named J09D_DIRECT_MAIL including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
12. Upload the file to send_bulk_mail service for sending direct emails to all the customers.
13. Export the final data except MANDATORY_READING and DIRECT_MAIL entries from the table as CSV file named J09D including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
14. Send them to the EVU team to meter.readings@evu.com
15. Delete the temporary table after exporting the data."}

structured_content.process_rule:
1. Make a copy of decision_table with TOURS starting with J09D named J09D_temp
2. Update the table with an additional empty column ENTSCHEIDUNG
3. Apply the following rules to the joined table:
    1. Count the number of EQUNR for every HAUS and set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA" if there are less than 3 EQUNR. ELSE set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "EVU"
    2. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 of 0 to "EVU"
    3. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 500 - 599 to "EVU"
    4. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 900 - 999 to "EVU"
    5. SET all houses with address area Wiblingwerde or Breckerfeld to "EVU"
4. JOIN this table with the EABLG table using INSTALLATION.
5. JOIN this table with the NET_MASTER table and the SALES_MASTER table using EQUNR.
6. Compare sales data and net data for these IDs:
    If sales data is there, take sales data and empty net data.
    Otherwise stay with net data and empty sales data.
7. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "MANDATORY_READING", for every EQUNR in EABL where both ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the Record created on 2024 and ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the Record created on 2023.
8. Export all MANDATORY_READING entries from the final table as CSV file named J09D_MANDATORY_READING including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
9. Send them to the the internal team to mandatory.reading@provider.com
10. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "DIRECT_MAIL", for every EQUNR in EABL where ISTABLART_TXT = "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP" in 2024 and ISTABLART_TXT = "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP" in 2023.
11. Export all DIRECT_MAIL entries from the final table as CSV file named J09D_DIRECT_MAIL including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
12. Upload the file to send_bulk_mail service for sending direct emails to all the customers.
13. Export the final data except MANDATORY_READING and DIRECT_MAIL entries from the table as CSV file named J09D including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
14. Send them to the EVU team to meter.readings@evu.com
15. Delete the temporary table after exporting the data.

process_rule (TEXT) NOT NULL - Process rule text/description"}

args.sqlite_command: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09D_temp

CREATE TABLE J09D_temp AS
SELECT d.*, NULL AS ENTSCHEIDUNG
FROM decision_table d
WHERE d.TOUR LIKE 'J09D%'

WITH eq_per_haus AS (
    SELECT HAUS, COUNT(DISTINCT EQUNR) AS eq_count
    FROM J09D_temp
    GROUP BY HAUS
)
UPDATE J09D_temp
SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = CASE
    WHEN eq.eq_count < 3 THEN 'KSA'
    ELSE 'EVU'
END
FROM eq_per_haus eq
WHERE J09D_temp.HAUS = eq.HAUS;

UPDATE J09D_temp
SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = CASE
    WHEN (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT t2.EQUNR) FROM J09D_temp t2 WHERE t2.HAUS = J09D_temp.HAUS) < 3 THEN 'KSA'
    ELSE 'EVU'
END;
UPDATE J09D_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU' WHERE HOUSE_NUM1 = 0;
UPDATE J09D_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU' WHERE HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 500 AND 599;
UPDATE J09D_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU' WHERE HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 900 AND 999;
UPDATE J09D_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU' WHERE CITY1 IN ('Wiblingwerde', 'Breckerfeld') OR CITY2 IN ('Wiblingwerde', 'Breckerfeld');
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09D_joined

CREATE TABLE J09D_joined AS
SELECT 
    t.*, 
    eablg."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." AS MR_Doc_No,
    eablg.Installation AS EABLG_Installation
FROM J09D_temp t
LEFT JOIN eanl ON t.ANLAGE = eanl.Installation
LEFT JOIN eablg ON eablg.Installation = t.ANLAGE;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09D_full

CREATE TABLE J09D_full AS
WITH base AS (
    SELECT 
        j.*,
        eabl."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." AS MR_Doc_No_EABL,
        eabl.ISTABLART_TXT,
        eabl."Record created on" AS EABL_Record_Created_On
    FROM J09D_joined j
    LEFT JOIN eabl ON eabl.EQUNR = j.EQUNR
),
net_vs_sales AS (
    SELECT
        b.*,
        sm.TITLE AS SALES_TITLE,
        sm.FORENAME AS SALES_FORENAME,
        sm.SURNAME AS SALES_SURNAME,
        sm.STREET AS SALES_STREET,
        sm.STREETNO AS SALES_STREETNO,
        sm.CITY1 AS SALES_CITY1,
        sm.CITY2 AS SALES_CITY2,
        sm.POST_CODE1 AS SALES_POST_CODE1,
        sm.EMAIL AS SALES_EMAIL,
        nm.TITLE AS NET_TITLE,
        nm.FORENAME AS NET_FORENAME,
        nm.SURNAME AS NET_SURNAME,
        nm.STREET AS NET_STREET,
        nm.STREETNO AS NET_STREETNO,
        nm.CITY1 AS NET_CITY1,
        nm.CITY2 AS NET_CITY2,
        nm.POST_CODE1 AS NET_POST_CODE1,
        nm.EMAIL AS NET_EMAIL
    FROM base b
    LEFT JOIN sales_master sm ON sm.EQUNR = b.EQUNR
    LEFT JOIN net_master nm ON nm.EQUNR = b.EQUNR
),
resolved AS (
    SELECT
        *,
        CASE WHEN SALES_EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_TITLE ELSE NET_TITLE END AS TITLE,
        CASE WHEN SALES_EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_FORENAME ELSE NET_FORENAME END AS FORENAME,
        CASE WHEN SALES_EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_SURNAME ELSE NET_SURNAME END AS SURNAME,
        CASE WHEN SALES_EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_STREET ELSE NET_STREET END AS STREET,
        CASE WHEN SALES_EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_STREETNO ELSE NET_STREETNO END AS STREETNO,
        CASE WHEN SALES_EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_POST_CODE1 ELSE NET_POST_CODE1 END AS POST_CODE1,
        CASE WHEN SALES_EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_CITY1 ELSE NET_CITY1 END AS CITY1,
        CASE WHEN SALES_EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_CITY2 ELSE NET_CITY2 END AS CITY2,
        CASE WHEN SALES_EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_EMAIL ELSE NET_EMAIL END AS EMAIL
    FROM (
        SELECT
            nvs.*,
            sm.EQUNR AS SALES_EQUNR
        FROM net_vs_sales nvs
        LEFT JOIN sales_master sm ON sm.EQUNR = nvs.EQUNR
    ) x
)
SELECT * FROM resolved;
PRAGMA table_info(J09D_full);
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09D_joined;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09D_full;
SELECT DISTINCT substr("Record created on",1,4) AS year, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM eabl GROUP BY year ORDER BY year;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09D_eabl_flags;

CREATE TABLE J09D_eabl_flags AS
WITH flags AS (
    SELECT
        EQUNR,
        MAX(CASE WHEN ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP' AND substr("Record created on",1,4) = '2023' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_ms_2023,
        MAX(CASE WHEN ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP' AND substr("Record created on",1,4) = '2024' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_ms_2024,
        MAX(CASE WHEN ISTABLART_TXT = 'Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP' AND substr("Record created on",1,4) = '2023' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_cust_2023,
        MAX(CASE WHEN ISTABLART_TXT = 'Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP' AND substr("Record created on",1,4) = '2024' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_cust_2024
    FROM eabl
    GROUP BY EQUNR
)
SELECT
    EQUNR,
    CASE WHEN has_ms_2023 = 1 AND has_ms_2024 = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_mandatory,
    CASE WHEN has_cust_2023 = 1 AND has_cust_2024 = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_direct_mail
FROM flags;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09D_eabl_flags;

CREATE TABLE J09D_full AS
WITH base AS (
    SELECT 
        t.*,
        eablg."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.",
        eablg.Installation AS EABLG_Installation
    FROM J09D_temp t
    LEFT JOIN eablg ON eablg.Installation = t.ANLAGE
),
net_vs_sales AS (
    SELECT
        b.*,
        sm.TITLE AS SALES_TITLE,
        sm.FORENAME AS SALES_FORENAME,
        sm.SURNAME AS SALES_SURNAME,
        sm.STREET AS SALES_STREET,
        sm.STREETNO AS SALES_STREETNO,
        sm.CITY1 AS SALES_CITY1,
        sm.CITY2 AS SALES_CITY2,
        sm.POST_CODE1 AS SALES_POST_CODE1,
        sm.EMAIL AS SALES_EMAIL,
        nm.TITLE AS NET_TITLE,
        nm.FORENAME AS NET_FORENAME,
        nm.SURNAME AS NET_SURNAME,
        nm.STREET AS NET_STREET,
        nm.STREETNO AS NET_STREETNO,
        nm.CITY1 AS NET_CITY1,
        nm.CITY2 AS NET_CITY2,
        nm.POST_CODE1 AS NET_POST_CODE1,
        nm.EMAIL AS NET_EMAIL,
        sm.EQUNR AS SALES_EQUNR
    FROM base b
    LEFT JOIN sales_master sm ON sm.EQUNR = b.EQUNR
    LEFT JOIN net_master nm ON nm.EQUNR = b.EQUNR
),
resolved AS (
    SELECT
        "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.",
        HAUS,
        ANLAGE,
        ME_MA_ID,
        EQUNR,
        HOUSE_NUM1,
        ENTSCHEIDUNG,
        CASE WHEN SALES_EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_TITLE ELSE NET_TITLE END AS TITLE,
        CASE WHEN SALES_EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_FORENAME ELSE NET_FORENAME END AS FORENAME,
        CASE WHEN SALES_EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_SURNAME ELSE NET_SURNAME END AS SURNAME,
        CASE WHEN SALES_EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_STREET ELSE NET_STREET END AS STREET,
        CASE WHEN SALES_EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_STREETNO ELSE NET_STREETNO END AS STREETNO,
        CASE WHEN SALES_EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_POST_CODE1 ELSE NET_POST_CODE1 END AS POST_CODE1,
        CASE WHEN SALES_EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_CITY1 ELSE NET_CITY1 END AS CITY1,
        CASE WHEN SALES_EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_CITY2 ELSE NET_CITY2 END AS CITY2,
        CASE WHEN SALES_EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_EMAIL ELSE NET_EMAIL END AS EMAIL
    FROM net_vs_sales
)
SELECT * FROM resolved;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09D_full;

args.email: Please find attached the mandatory meter readings for tour J09D.
Please find attached the meter readings for EVU processing for tour J09D (excluding mandatory readings and direct mail customers).

args.sqlite_command: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09D_temp;

kwargs.content:
I have executed process J09D end-to-end as specified:

1. Created `J09D_temp` from `decision_table` for all TOURS starting with `J09D` and added an empty `ENTSCHEIDUNG` column.
2. Applied the decision rules on `J09D_temp`:
   - Counted EQUNR per HAUS and set:
     - `ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'KSA'` if a house has fewer than 3 EQUNR.
     - Otherwise `ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU'`.
   - Overwrote to `EVU` for:
     - `HOUSE_NUM1 = 0`
     - `HOUSE_NUM1` in ranges `500–599` and `900–999`
     - Addresses in Wiblingwerde or Breckerfeld (via CITY1/CITY2).
3. Derived reading flags from `eabl`:
   - Marked `ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING'` where an EQUNR has ISTABLART_TXT = `Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP` in both 2023 and 2024.
   - Marked `ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'DIRECT_MAIL'` where an EQUNR has ISTABLART_TXT = `Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP` in both 2023 and 2024 (no rows matched this condition for J09D).
4. Joined with `EABLG` via `ANLAGE` (INSTALLATION) to get the `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`.
5. Joined with `NET_MASTER` and `SALES_MASTER` via `EQUNR` and resolved address/contact data:
   - If sales data exists: used sales data, cleared net data.
   - Otherwise: used net data, sales fields remain empty.
6. Built final table `J09D_full` with the required columns:
   - `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`.

Then I executed the output steps:

7. Exported all `MANDATORY_READING` entries to CSV:
   - File: `J09D_MANDATORY_READING.csv`
   - Path: `sessions/gpt-5.1/processadaptation_extension_mail_processadaptationmethod_add_tour_J09D_seed_4506/J09D_MANDATORY_READING.csv`
   - Rows: 1,199
8. Sent this file to `mandatory.reading@provider.com`.
9. Attempted to export `DIRECT_MAIL` entries:
   - No rows matched the `DIRECT_MAIL` condition, so no `J09D_DIRECT_MAIL.csv` file was produced and thus no bulk mail was triggered.
10. Exported the remaining entries (i.e., not `MANDATORY_READING` and not `DIRECT_MAIL`) to CSV:
    - File: `J09D.csv`
    - Path: `sessions/gpt-5.1/processadaptation_extension_mail_processadaptationmethod_add_tour_J09D_seed_4506/J09D.csv`
    - Rows: 26,434
11. Sent `J09D.csv` to `meter.readings@evu.com` (EVU team).
12. Dropped the temporary table `J09D_temp` and cleaned up intermediate tables.

If you’d like, I can also summarize key counts (e.g., KSA vs EVU vs MANDATORY_READING) or adjust any of the rules for a new run.
